SPACEMERCS-AUTO_RESPONSIVE_CUIRASS.descr: The first time each combat you apply a debuff and gain a buff in a single turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
SPACEMERCS-AUTO_RESPONSIVE_CUIRASS.title: Auto-Responsive Cuirass
SPACEMERCS-OF_THE_VOID.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Void[/gold], heal [blue]1[/blue] hp and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Hunger[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-OF_THE_VOID.title: Of The Void
SPACEMERCS-MINIATURE_SUN.description: The first time you lose HP during combat, gain [blue]10[/blue] [color=springgreen]Cure[/color]
SPACEMERCS-MINIATURE_SUN.title: Miniature Sun
SPACEMERCS-EMPTY_CORNUCOPIA.title: Empty Cornucopia
SPACEMERCS-BROKEN_CODE.description: The first time you gain [gold]Amp[/gold] each turn, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-BROKEN_CODE.title: Broken Code
SPACEMERCS-EXPERIMENTAL_TECH.description: Whenever you apply [orange]Scorch[/orange] or [gold]Jolt[/gold], apply an additional [blue]1[/blue] [orange]Scorch[/orange] or [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Jolt[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-EXPERIMENTAL_TECH.title: Experimental Tech
SPACEMERCS-PORTABLE_IGLOO.description: At the start of combat, add an [gold]Ice Block[/gold] to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-PORTABLE_IGLOO.title: Portable Igloo
SPACEMERCS-FOCUSED_LIGHT.description: Upon pickup, focus your deck around an element, but become [gold]Overwhelmed[/gold] with Light
SPACEMERCS-FOCUSED_LIGHT.eventDescriptio: Focus your deck around an element, but become [gold]Overwhelmed[/gold] with Light.
SPACEMERCS-FOCUSED_LIGHT.title: Focused Light
